name: Mezgaldi of Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange onions in layers in a large shallow bowl.
2. Combine oil, saffron, ginger, pepper, half cinnamon & sugar. Pour over onions, add just enough water to cover.
3. Mix well and let marinate for 2 hours.
4. Place celery stalks crossways in the bottom of a tagine or casserole. This protects the onions from scorching.
5. Arrange onions in overlapping layers and pour over marinade. Sprinkle with remaining cinnamon & sugar.
6. Cover tagine & cook at 325°F for 30 to 40 minutes.
7. Uncover and brown under a broiler just before serving. The onions should be slightly caramelized and very tender.
